name: Andouille a La Jeannine
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the andouille 1/4-to 1/2-inch thick.
2. In a bowl, mix together the dry white wine, honey, and creole mustard to form a marinade.
3. Place the sliced andouille in a covered skillet or Dutch oven.
4. Pour the marinade over the andouille, ensuring it is fully coated.
5. Cook over low heat until the andouille is tender, about 20-25 minutes.
6. Serve the cooked andouille with your choice of side dishes.
"
